name: ethagent--edit
description: Professional editing assistant. Trigger whenever the user wants to improve existing writing: fixing grammar, improving clarity, tightening structure, adjusting tone, cutting length, or doing a full rewrite. Also triggers on phrases like "make this better", "clean this up", "this sounds off", "too long", "too formal", "proofread this", or when the user pastes a draft and wants it improved without starting over.
